zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby於大約1193年出生在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利時，他的父親William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby32歲，母親Agnes of Chester20歲。他於1219年5月14日之前與Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年3月24日在英國萊希斯特斯爾艾維頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby于大约1193年出生在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利时，他的父亲William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby32岁，母亲Agnes of Chester20岁。他于1219年5月14日之前与Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby在威尔士布洛可爾布洛可结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年3月24日在英国萊希斯特斯爾艾維頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby was born about 1193, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, his father, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, was 32 and his mother, Agnes of Chester, was 20. He married Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby before 14 May 1219, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. He died on 24 March 1254, in Evington, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby est né environ 1193, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Chester, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby avant 14 mai 1219, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1254, à Evington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England: Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby um 1193 in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby 32 und seine Mutter Agnes of Chester 20. Er hat vor 14. Mai 1219 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Töchter. Er starb am 24. März 1254 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Evington, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby è nato il circa 1193 nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes of Chester, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby prima del 14 maggio 1219, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. Morì il 24 marzo 1254, nel Evington, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Merevale, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyが約1193年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derbyは32歳，母Agnes of Chesterは20歳であった。1219年5月14日以前にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでSibyl Marshall , Countess of Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年3月24日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアエヴィントンで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(이)가 대략 1193년 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes of Chester(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1219년 5월 14일 이전 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 3월 24일 영국 레이스스터실르 에빙턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England: Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby nasceu aproximadamente 1193, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Chester, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby antes 14 de maio de 1219, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1254, em Evington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Woodham Ferrers, Essex, England: Woodham Ferrers, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby родился около 1193 г. в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Chester, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby перед 14 май 1219 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Он умер 24 марта 1254 г. в местности эвингтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby antes de 14 de mayo de 1219, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijas. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1254, en Evington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
